test.query: SELECT * FROM hits_100m_single ORDER BY (CounterID, EventDate) LIMIT 15000
SELECT * FROM hits_100m_single ORDER BY CounterID DESC, toStartOfWeek(EventDate) DESC LIMIT 15000
SELECT * FROM hits_100m_single ORDER BY (CounterID, EventDate, URL) LIMIT 5000
SELECT * FROM hits_100m_single WHERE CounterID IN (152220, 168777, 149234, 149234) ORDER BY CounterID DESC, EventDate DESC LIMIT 30000
SELECT * FROM hits_100m_single WHERE UserID=1988954671305023629 ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate LIMIT 5000
